title: Galaxy Space [Addon for Galacticraft]
description: This mod adds a lot of planets and moons for modification GalactiCraft.
body:
# [Main Page is on CurseForge!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/galaxy-space-addon-for-galacticraft)  Developed and Maintained by BlesseNtumble, AndRey, ZlayaSeledka and AstroMaster.

# About :
This mod adds a lot of planets and moons for modification GalactiCraft. The addon will not work without a main mod - GalactiCraft.
We do not pursue other creators of addons. We try to make high quality.
The addon is made for version Minecraft 1.7.10 and 1.12.2 and earlier versions will not be transferred.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## **For 2.0.1 STABLE version and above need  [AsmodeusCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/asmodeuscore)  lib.**

**Features :**  
"#"  - Realized planets/moons  
"*"  - GalactiCraft content  
"$" - Unrealized planet with realized moons  
"@"  - Unrealized planets/moons or planned content  
  
**Star Systems:**

-   **Star:** Sol
-   **Planets:** #Mercury, #Venus(1.7.10 version),  *Overworld, *Mars,  Ceres,  *Asteroids,  $Jupiter, $Saturn, $Uranus, $Neptune,  #Pluto, #Kuiper Belt, @Haumea, @Makemake,  @Eris
-   **Moons:**# Moon,  #Phobos,  @Deimos, #Europa, #Io, #Ganymede, #Callisto, #Enceladus, #Titan, #Miranda, @Oberon, @Proteus,  #Triton

-   **Star:**  aCentauri A, aCentauri B, Proxima Centauri
-   **Planets:** #Proxima B

-   **Star:**  Barnarda A
-   **Planets:**  @Barnarda B,  #Barnarda C,  @Barnarda D, @Barnarda E
-   **Moons:**  @Barnarda B1, @Barnarda C1, @Barnarda C2

- **Star:** Tau Ceti
- **Planets:** @Tau Ceti G, @Tau Ceti H, @Tau Ceti E, #Tau Ceti F

****Mobs:**** Evolved Fire Skeleton, Evolved Fire Spider, Evolved Fire Creeper, Evolved Cold Blaze  
****Bosses:**** Evolved Boss Blaze, Evolved Boss Ghast

****GitHub: [[Click]](https://github.com/BlesseNtumble/GalaxySpace)****

**MinecraftForum****: [[Click]](http://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding/minecraft-mods/2412548-1-7-10-galaxy-space-addon-for-galacticraft-3)**

**Discord: [![](https://img.shields.io/discord/309283659935121409.svg?logo=discord&colorB=7289DA)](https://discord.gg/8EHZdFZ)** 

**Patreon: [![](https://img.shields.io/endpoint.svg?url=https://shieldsio-patreon.vercel.app/api?username=BlesseNtumble&type=pledges&style=flat)](https://www.patreon.com/blessentumble)** 

**Русское сообщество аддона:  [[Click]](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fvk.com%252faddon.galaxyspace)**

-   Use in mod packs allowed.
-   Use custom resource pack allowed.
-   **Modification of the add-on is forbidden!**
-   **Forbidden steal code or assets.**
-   **Forbidden release or post mod on any other site without link to curseforge page.**
